hero.title: Application Features
hero.subtitle: Detailed overview of your energy consumption and costs in one place
hero.description: Track electricity, gas, and water usage and identify opportunities for savings. Our tools help you effectively monitor expenses across all your properties.

tracking.title: Consumption overview
tracking.description: Monitor electricity, gas, and water usage clearly in one place. Keep track of consumption trends across all your properties.

analytics.title: Advanced Charts and Reports
analytics.description: Track trends and compare consumption between different periods. Easily identify high usage and get data for effective savings.

costs.title: Tariffs and Cost Calculations
costs.description: Get an instant overview of costs across all categories. Easily identify your largest expenses and discover opportunities for savings.

premium.title: Advanced tools and alerts
premium.description: Get instant alerts for unusual fluctuations and tips for optimizing your costs. Make informed decisions with advanced insights and control.

usage.title: Unusual consumption increase
usage.description: 15% increase in electricity consumption compared to average.

optimization.title: Optimization recommendation
optimization.description: The current gas tariff does not match your usage.

savings.title: Annual savings potential
savings.description: With optimization, you can save up to 15% annually.
